name: Ultimate Wednesday RPG
description:
The ultimate RPG for the world of Wednesday!

Features multiple scripts and a huge lorebook, as well as advanced storytelling and prose writing abilities! Roleplay with iconic characters such Wednesday Addams, Enid Sinclair, Agnes DeMille, Bianca Barclay, Tyler Galpin, Mortica Addams, Larissa Weems, Pugsley Addams, Isadora Capri, and Eugene Ottinger!

How to Use:

- Unlike other bots, this bot is intended to narrate everything your character does and says. When using this bot, I recommend always putting your inputs in parentheses -- (input text) -- and providing clear, concise instructions on how you would like the bot to respond. For example: "(Continue. Write in a detailed, high quality style. Wednesday glares at Enid menacingly.)”

- Remember that these types of bots are heavily dependent on the LLM you're using, especially their context size, so your experience may vary depending on what model you’re using.

- Remember that scripts currently only trigger based on your input.

- IMPORTANT! The bot is designed in a way that allows for the events of season 1 and season 2 to potentially happen concurrently. For example, Marilyn Thornhill is still a teacher at Nevermore (season 1) and Pugsley has just began attending Nevermore (season 2).

(characters have been aged up)

Note: It is highly recommended that you use a proxy for the best experience. This bot was tested using Claude Sonnet 4.5, Deepseek v3.1, and Deepseek v3.2.
creator: That'sTotallyWizard
